vocab.meaning: sức hút về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: I am often captivated by the aesthetic appeal of glass-clad structures that reflect the shifting clouds.

vocab.meaning: các chi tiết trang trí công phu
vocab.example: Older cathedrals possess such ornate details that you can spend hours capturing every single carving.

vocab.meaning: sự đối xứng và cân bằng
vocab.example: Architectural photography is deeply satisfying when you find a building that exhibits perfect symmetry and balance.

vocab.meaning: sự tương phản gay gắt/rõ rệt
vocab.example: I love photographing the stark contrast between a colonial-era villa and the neon lights of a nearby skyscraper.
Changing your visual perspective by shooting from the ground up can make a modest building look monumental.
Taking photos is my way of documenting the architectural heritage of my city before it is replaced by modern blocks.

vocab.meaning: sự đan xen giữa ánh sáng và bóng tối
vocab.example: The play of light and shadow on a concrete facade can create incredibly dramatic and moody photographs.
The government headquarters is such an imposing structure that it dominates every frame I take of the plaza.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế mang tính công năng/thực dụng
vocab.example: Modern industrial warehouses often have a clean, functional design that looks surprisingly sharp in black and white photos.

vocab.meaning: nguyên khối/khổng lồ và vững chãi
vocab.example: I find monolithic brutalist buildings fascinating to photograph because of their raw power and lack of decoration.
